summary: Comprehensive frontend testing completed for Agung Darmawan UMKM Website landing page. All major features working correctly - page loads without console errors, all sections render properly, navigation works, mobile menu toggles correctly, FAQ accordion functions, all CTAs link to correct WhatsApp number, SEO meta tags and JSON-LD structured data present, robots.txt and sitemap.xml accessible.

issues: Desktop nav links (Layanan/Paket Harga/Portfolio/Proses/FAQ/Kontak) are not visible on initial page load - only 'Konsultasi Gratis' CTA shows. Nav links appear after scroll when navbar turns solid. This may be intentional design but could affect UX.

critical_code_review_comments: All data-testid attributes properly implemented for testing
SEO implementation is comprehensive with proper meta tags, Open Graph, and JSON-LD structured data (ProfessionalService, Service, FAQPage, Person)
WhatsApp integration consistent across all CTAs with correct phone number (628211001473)
FAQ accordion state management works correctly with first item open by default
context_for_next_testing_agent: Pure static React frontend with no backend. All CTAs open WhatsApp links. Contact form uses client-side window.open to WhatsApp. All sections tested: Navbar, Hero, Stats, About, Pricing (4 cards with TERLARIS ribbon), Process (5 steps), Portfolio (3 cards with Live/Source buttons), WhyUs (6 cards), Testimonials (3 cards with 5-star ratings), FAQ (8 accordion items), Contact (form + Google Maps), Footer, FloatingWA. SEO meta tags and JSON-LD verified. robots.txt and sitemap.xml accessible.
